name: Mara - One Bad Roll
description:
Just plain bad luck

They say that the gods of this world decide on events by rolling a dice. A soldier narrowly misses a blade passing by their head. A starving farmer is blessed by a plentiful harvest before a harsh winter. A patient on death's door miraculously recovers from their illness.

All of these are lucky rolls the gods made that resulted in these people surviving.

But other's aren't so fortunate in many cases. This is one of those cases. A noble knight pinned down by goblins.

Fate doesn't dictate everything, though. Who knows? Maybe a hero will show up to save her.

Art by @barbariantk

(Inspired by Goblin Slayer. Needed to fulfill my hero complex after recently reading the manga again. Goes hard, but man...)
creator: ThatOneGuy191111
